title: phea-atlas: Physics-Guided Bayesian P(HEA) for High-Entropy Alloy Discovery
description: Reproduction code and consolidated dataset for a three-layer, physics-guided Bayesian expert system that outputs a calibrated probability P(HEA) in [0, 1] for any five-component high-entropy alloy drawn from a 44-element pool. The three layers are: a Miedema semi-empirical prior on binary mixing enthalpies; a Gaussian-process posterior trained on experimental binary mixing enthalpies, whose uncertainty propagates analytically to any multicomponent composition; and a temperature-scaled logistic outcome layer calibrated on experimental HEA outcomes. The repository includes the numbered pipeline that computes a probabilistic decision atlas over all 1,086,008 five-element subsets of the pool. The large derived atlas files are deposited as a linked dataset record on Zenodo. The accompanying manuscript is currently under peer review; citation details will be completed on acceptance.
